name: ATS-Mini Remote Repo
subtitle: Repository for the ATS-Mini Remote iOS app
description: An AltStore/Feather compatible source for the ATS-Mini Remote iOS application.

apps.name: ATS-Mini Remote
apps.subtitle: Remote control for ATS-Mini Receiver
apps.localizedDescription: Control your ATS-Mini receiver over Bluetooth LE. Tune frequencies, manage presets, visualize spectrum/waterfall, and perform OTA firmware updates.

versions.localizedDescription: Full iOS 26 Liquid Glass UI overhaul. Native .glassEffect() throughout, scroll bars hidden, Spectrum/Waterfall control layouts rebuilt (no more squeezed buttons), Settings moved to native Form with sections, firmware update with file picker / URL / progress / auto-reconnect.
Initial iOS release with optimized iOS 26 SwiftUI layout adjustments, featuring native glass button styles and ViewThatFits dynamic type wrapping.
